nodes.label: Doggie Styles Grooming Spa & Boutique
nodes.rationale: Marketing website for the multi award winning dog grooming salon at Alpha Garden Centre, Wickford, Essex.

nodes.label: Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4 Stack
Centralised Site Content Config (src/data/site.ts)
nodes.rationale: Everything a client would ever ask to change (phone, email, booking link, socials, address, opening hours, service categories, prices, gallery photos, reviews) lives in one file so edits never touch component code. Prices are null until the salon confirms its price list; setting e.g. price: "from £35" makes the price appear in the menu automatically. Hours are Tuesday-Saturday 9-5 pending confirmation via site.hours.

nodes.label: Live Instagram Gallery with Bundled Fallback
nodes.rationale: Instagram does not allow anonymous feed access, so live updates require a one-time connection by the account owner through a feed service whose JSON feed URL goes into instagramFeedUrl in src/data/site.ts. Real photos downloaded from @doggie_styles_spa ship in public/gallery/ and are shown whenever the feed is unreachable, so the gallery never breaks.

nodes.label: ShakeYourTail Booking Portal
nodes.rationale: Online booking goes through the salon's ShakeYourTail portal. The portal blocks being embedded in other sites (X-Frame-Options), so every Book Online button opens it in a new tab instead of an iframe.

nodes.label: Google Review Link (site.reviewUrl)
nodes.rationale: site.reviewUrl currently opens the salon's Google Maps listing; once the salon shares its Google Business Profile short review link (g.page/r/... URL) it should be pasted in so 'Leave a review' opens the review box directly.
